subject: [PATCH 4/7 v2] mm/memcontrol: convert memcg to use page_counter_stock

2026-05-22.patch_summary: This patch converts the memcg (memory cgroup) code to use page_counter_stock instead of its own handling logic. This change removes special casing for avoiding refilling and flushing of old stock, allows failure during page_counter_enable_stock() if memory allocation fails, and restructures drain_all_stock to iterate CPUs in an outer loop for more efficient scheduling.
